column1: How to raise fertility rate? You just make it illegal to have babies ... Imagine, you need a special license to make babies. And after passing exams it is really a waste to not actually have some. "Do you have a parent license?", "No? Sounds good for me, I am only interested in one stand".  But if you make it, you are saying that you are interested in being a father. We have licenses for driving, fishing, being Ordained Minister. Doesnt the parenting holds more responsibility then the listed ones? You don't have a license for having children - you need to make an abortion. The father does not have it - abortion as well.
How to decrease CO2 emissions (from flies or food production by also decreasing obesity rate)? Make people pay for fly tickets proportionally to how much they weight.
I believe in aliens. I believe they put a seed of DNA mechanism on earth and just go away. I believe it because I feel I can do the same. As a men, I could easily just plant a seed and go away.
Covid as a vaccination on a society level. Training for a "real" pandemic. Seens like a failed training. But it is obviously not a failure if you learn something. And what have we learned?
Before I started interneting I didnt know I need anything. After a few advertisements I realized I need a lot of things I never thought about before.
